title: ExtractionResult
description: Output of the write-time feature extraction LLM call. Runs over each incoming user utterance and produces structured metadata stored alongside the embedding. See idea.md §4.1, §4.2.

prompt_template_version.description: Hash or semver of the Jinja2 template used.

affective_valence.description: Dimensional affect — not categorical emotion labels.

behaviors_referenced.description: Controlled vocabulary from shared/vocabularies/behaviors.json. Empty array if no behaviors referenced.

stance.description: How the user related to the behavior in the utterance. Critical for not confusing 'I thought about restricting' with 'I restricted'.

temporal_marker.description: Free-text excerpt anchoring when ('this morning', 'yesterday', 'last week'). Null if unclear.

distortions.description: CBT-E / CBT cognitive distortion categories present. Open vocabulary; common values: all_or_nothing, catastrophizing, mind_reading, fortune_telling, should_statements, overgeneralization, personalization, emotional_reasoning, magnification_minimization, labeling.

themes.description: Free-text thematic tags — what the user is talking ABOUT (work, family, body, etc.).

key_phrases.description: Verbatim user phrases worth preserving for later 'echo' insights (idea.md §5.4). Up to 5.

network_nodes_activated.description: Controlled vocabulary keys from shared/vocabularies/network_nodes.json. The nodes whose activation the utterance evidences.

implicated_need_states.description: SDT need-states the utterance implicates, with life-domain context.

domain.description: Life domain: work, relationships, family, self_direction, body, social, other.

contextual_markers.description: Context the user mentioned or that can be inferred from session metadata.

social_context.description: alone, with_partner, with_family, with_friends, at_work, public, other.

location_type.description: home, work, transit, restaurant, public, other.

after_meal_context.description: Whether utterance occurs around a mealtime — flagged because ED-pack reasoning is meal-context-sensitive.

safety_signals.description: Pre-pipeline safety scan results. Any 'true' here short-circuits to the safety template (idea.md §9).

medical_acute.description: Refeeding signs, severe restriction, syncope, vomiting blood.

asking_for_methods.description: User asks about methods or means. Always refused per idea.md §9.2.

asking_for_numbers.description: User asks for calorie/weight/duration numbers. Always refused per idea.md §9.3.

low_information.description: Greeting, scheduling, very short. Stored but down-weighted for retrieval (idea.md §4.4).
